title: Smart Investment Secrets TikTok Won't Tell You
description: Stop wasting money! Learn smart investment strategies that actually work. Save more, spend less, build wealth faster. #SmartInvesting #PersonalFinance #WealthBuilding

slides.topSection: Show 3 wasteful spending icons (coffee shop, luxury clothes, takeout) with red X center, caption: 'Throwing cash away daily'
slides.bottomSection: Show 3 growing investment icons (stock graph, real estate, gold bars) with green check center, caption: 'Wealth compounding over time'

slides.topSection: Show small amount ($100 bill) with red X, 3 year timeline with decreasing value, caption: 'Cash loses purchasing power'
slides.bottomSection: Show same amount growing through 10 years with green check, upward arrow and dollar signs, caption: 'Investments multiply over time'

slides.topSection: Show lottery ticket, crypto crash, get rich quick schemes with red X, caption: 'High risk, usually losses'
slides.bottomSection: Show steady index fund, dividend stocks, bonds with green check, caption: 'Consistent returns win long-term'

slides.topSection: Show cash stack with red X, price tags rising, '100% cash losing value', caption: 'Cash erodes with inflation'
slides.bottomSection: Show diversified portfolio with green check, steady growth arrows, 'Balanced assets beat inflation', caption: 'Investments preserve value'

slides.topSection: Show single stock basket with red X, cracking open, 'All eggs in one basket', caption: 'Concentrated risk dangerous'
slides.bottomSection: Show pie chart portfolio with green check, multiple slices, 'Spread across sectors', caption: 'Diversified = less risk'

slides.topSection: Show expensive advisor with red X, fee calculator, '2% fees eat returns', caption: 'High fees destroy gains'
slides.bottomSection: Show low cost index fund with green check, fee calculator at 0.1%, 'Minimal fees maximize growth', caption: 'Low cost = more profit'
